title: hieracium cicerbita
intro: Hieracium cicerbita, also known as Hawk's beard or False hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems. The health benefits of Hieracium cicerbita include its potential to support liver function, boost the immune system, and act as a natural diuretic. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
